2606.25705.title: GUI agent: Guided Exploration of User-Sensitive Screens
2606.25705.paper_summary: LLM agents are increasingly being used to automate tasks for users within an open GUI environment. They inevitably encounter screens containing user-sensitive information, for which takeover of task execution by the user is highly desirable or even necessary. State-of-the-art LLM-driven agents are usually fine-tuned to complete tasks regardless of the safety implications of their actions. This makes their real-world deployment difficult and adversely affects the reliability. Therefore, it is crucial to identify and categorize user-sensitive states and define user-sensitive queries. This dataset would be to engineers to recognize and request handover to the user in critical scenarios. This short paper develops an explorer agent that systematically explores the query space starting from one demonstrated task to identify queries that, if executed, would lead to user-sensitive states in a GUI environment.
2606.25705.paper_summary_zh: LLM 代理越來越多地被用來自動化用戶在開放 GUI 環境中的任務。<lb/>它們不可避免地會遇到包含用戶敏感信息的螢幕，這時用戶接管任務執行是非常可取甚至必要的。<lb/>最先進的 LLM 驅動代理通常會進行微調，以完成任務，而不考慮其行動的安全性影響。<lb/>這使得它們在現實世界中的部署變得困難，並對可靠性產生不利影響。<lb/>因此，識別和分類用戶敏感狀態並定義用戶敏感查詢至關重要。<lb/>這個數據集將幫助工程師在關鍵情境中識別並請求將任務移交給用戶。<lb/>這篇短文開發了一個探索代理，系統地從一個示範任務開始探索查詢空間，以識別如果執行將導致 GUI 環境中的用戶敏感狀態的查詢。
2606.25705.author: Aradhana Nayak et.al.
2606.25705.authors: Aradhana Nayak, Mussadiq Nazeer, Wang Peng, Feng Liu
